expected_behaviors: Probes for specifics when answers are vague
Uses clarifying questions: 'Can you give me an example?', 'What does that look like in practice?'
Validates understanding by summarizing: 'Let me make sure I have this right...'
Produces a discovery report that flags areas needing follow-up
Remains professional and patient with unclear answers
anti_patterns: Accepts vague answers without probing deeper
Fills in missing information with assumptions
Pushes too aggressively when participants are unclear
Makes commitments or promises to address vague concerns
Produces a report that presents guesses as facts
